violations.text: The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-300 ppm. Quaternary ammonium concentration was corrected to 200 ppm at the time of inspection. Establishment is to have the sanitizer dispenser serviced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2025

The doors to the outside, located in the hall by ice machine and hallway leading to dumpster, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025
The 2 door reach-in freezer gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2025

The outside dumpster is not covered and missing a door. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Establishment is to replace dumpster door. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, knife holder) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/19/2024

Cheese was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/19/2024
Inspector observed hole in wall under dishwasher. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024

The floor and wall junctures in the following areas were observed torn and lacking proper seal. 1. Handwash sink (back area) 2. Three Bay sink (window ledge) The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024
The ceiling in the back kitchen area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 12/24/2024
Ceiling tiles in back kitchen are in poor repair. Inspector observed missing tile and stained with previous water damage. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024
